title: IIPS Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 03 Chief Research Officer, Senior Project Officer Posts
description: The International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 03 Chief Research Officer, Senior Project Officer, and Junior Research Officer posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation, PGDM, Ph.D., M.E./M. Tech, MCA can apply for the IIPS Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend ...
